flow_points: West Indies scored 45 runs without loss in the Powerplay (RR 7.5).
India started their Powerplay faster, scoring 53 runs but losing 2 wickets.
West Indies shifted momentum with a high-scoring finish in the Death Overs (RR 14.0).
India's bowlers struggled: Arshdeep Singh's economy was 10.75 (+2.0 vs career avg).
CV Varun also had an expensive outing with an economy of 10.0 (+2.64 vs career avg).
JJ Bumrah struggled with an economy of 9.25 (+2.4 vs career avg).
SV Samson anchored India's innings with 97 runs from 51 balls.
Samson's 97(51) was crucial, contributing 48.7% of India's total runs.
India maintained momentum with a strong finish in their Death Overs (RR 12.23).
India secured the victory by 5 wickets.
